titles.title: United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026
United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026
A bill to authorize a 2-year extension of the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations.
Committee on Foreign Relations. Ordered to be reported with an amendment in the nature of a substitute favorably.

term.name: U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom

bill.summary:
United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026
This bill reauthorizes the U.S. Commission on International Religious Freedom through FY2028. The commission is an independent federal commission tasked with monitoring international religious freedom conditions, reviewing U.S. government policy, and making policy recommendations.
